_note: SYNTHETIC test fixture (not real news). Built to exercise corroboration §5.5: the fact 'Reyes resigned' is asserted by 5 sources, but independent originators collapse to ~3 — one AFP wire node (the wire story + its 2 near-verbatim reprints + the citation-cascade all collapse to one), one independent original report, and one primary source (weighted highest). Live acquisition replaces this in P2.

articles.title: Valoria finance minister resigns amid procurement scandal
articles.body: Valoria's finance minister, Daniel Reyes, resigned on Tuesday amid a widening procurement scandal, the finance ministry said. Reyes had faced mounting pressure over state contracts awarded to a firm linked to his family. 'I am stepping down to allow a full and independent inquiry,' he said in a statement.

articles.title: Valoria finance minister resigns amid procurement scandal
articles.body: Valoria's finance minister, Daniel Reyes, resigned on Tuesday amid a widening procurement scandal, the finance ministry said. Reyes had faced mounting pressure over state contracts awarded to a firm linked to his family. He said he was stepping down to allow a full and independent inquiry.

articles.title: Reyes quits as Valoria finance minister
articles.body: Valoria's finance minister Daniel Reyes resigned on Tuesday amid a widening procurement scandal, the finance ministry said, according to AFP. Reyes had faced mounting pressure over state contracts awarded to a firm linked to his family.

articles.title: Reyes steps down days after our shell-company revelations
articles.body: Daniel Reyes stepped down from Valoria's finance ministry on Tuesday, days after this paper revealed that three state contracts had been routed through a shell company controlled by his brother-in-law. Reyes denied wrongdoing but said an independent inquiry was warranted.

articles.title: Statement on the resignation of the Minister of Finance
articles.body: The Minister of Finance, Daniel Reyes, has today tendered his resignation, effective immediately. An independent review of recent procurement decisions will commence under an external auditor.
